task_title: Test read_oauth_from_credentials with both JSON layouts

phase_history.output:
All 6 tests pass and committed. Here's what was added in `borg-rs/crates/borg-core/tests/config_tests.rs`:

| Test | Scenario |
|---|---|
| `test_primary_path_returns_token` | `claudeAiOauth.accessToken` present and non-empty → returns it |
| `test_fallback_path_returns_token` | Only `oauthToken` at root → returns it |
| `test_primary_wins_when_both_present` | Both fields present → `claudeAiOauth.accessToken` wins |
| `test_neither_present_returns_none` | Neither key in JSON → `None` |
| `test_malformed_json_returns_none` | Invalid JSON → `None` |
| `test_missing_file_returns_none` | File doesn't exist → `None` |
